title: Set of 3 Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids, Clear Bathroom Storage Organizer Canister Set for Qtips, Cotton Swabs, Cotton Balls, Bath Salts (H: 11", 8.5", 7.5", D: 5"; 23 FL.OZ, 34 FL.OZ and 45 FL.OZ)
description:
About this item
SET OF 3 GLASS JARS: The glass apothecary jars set is designed with three different heights. Small: H:7.5" × D5"; Middle: H:8.5" × D:5"; Large: H:11" × D:5". The capacities of the decor jars are 23 fl.oz, 34 fl.oz and 45 fl.oz, respectively.
SIMPLE AND GENEROUS DESIGNS: This candy jar with lid has a simple and generous design and glass bottles are sturdy high quality hand-blown from no lead glass. The set of 3 clear apothecary jars glass will bring a neat feeling to any room.
DECORATIVE GLASS JAR: The glass apothecary jars with lid are also fantastic for home décor. The glass jars can store various items from cookies and snacks to cotton balls and bath salts in an attractive way. A lovely and practical addition to your house.
IDEAL GIFT OPTION: The candy jars set are the perfect way to add festive holiday cheer to your home, for Wedding, Birthday Parties, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year. The simple, generous and lightweight design is guaranteed to impress your guest.
GUARANTEED: If there are problems with apothecary candy jars quality and transportation damage, you can enjoy unconditional return and refund serivce. Do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
I needed something to display some rocks I’ve collected over the years and came across these. While they were probably meant for bathroom odds n ends (maybe), they are very versatile in 3 sizes and high quality glass. They were packaged well too. I was expecting something basic but my display idea turned out great with some fake succulents. The lids are tall so they’ll need some head room on shelves but really nice simplicity in these. Cpuld you use them for organization? No, not really. In my opinion, these are too decor-like to really fit for efficient organizing. You could perhaps put dried beans or rice and showcase the neutral colors, but the jars will not fit a whole lot.I used these in my bathroom to store q-tips, facial pads, and decorative soaps. They are the perfect size, not too big, but definitely not too small. They would also look great in a kitchen for food storage. The glass is thick and they shipped in great condition. I like how the top of the lid is hollow and allows for more space inside the jar. Very beautiful! So glad I ordered!These were packaged very well! Perfect sizes for bath bombs & bath salts.These were well packaged, in good condition, and look amazing on the vanity. The tallest one fits a lot of cotton balls and the small one fits a lot of q-tips so they are quite functional, not just for looks. The middle one I put almost a full bag of the floss picks, and as you can see there is still quite a bit of room! They were also perfect size for the bathroom tray.I am so happy with these jars. They are beautiful and a great value.The glass is crystal clear and not at all thin like some other apothecary jars can be. They're great looking and are just what I was looking for.Using these to display seashells in my guest room. They were packed well and just took a quick wash to be ready to use. Nice dimensions. Decent value, price a bit on the high side. Happy with them.I thought I had order the plastic ones I received the glass containers. I have received many positive compliments which made me keep them.
I would buy them again!...I haven't planted in them yet, but they arrived intact and appear to be sturdy. I love the style. They can be used for so many things!I bought it to make decoration like the picture of the product im Amazon's page.. the jar arrive well packed and in perfect condition.
